case_title: LUM, HELEN C. VS DUFFY, GARVIN MARK

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUM, HELEN C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUFFY, GARVIN MARK $764.45 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $784.45, JUDGMENT IS STAYED UNTIL 6/6/98. IF DEFT. FAILS TO PAY PLFT IN FULL, THE SUM OF $764.45 BY 6/5/98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $764.45 FILED BY LUM, HELEN C. AS TO DEFENDANT DUFFY, GARVIN MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-28-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-07-1998 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
STAY ON ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UNTIL JUNE 6, 1998. IF DEFT FAILS TO PAY PLFT THE FULL SUM OF $764.45 BY JUNE 5, 1998.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUFFY, GARVIN MARK
